name: research_ethics_reconciliation_job_northpine_tru_loy
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In Research Ethics, the situation tagged internally around research ethics reconciliation job northpine tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Leila Park
agents.identity: I am Leila Park, the accountable executive on this bridge in Research Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fatima Rahman
agents.identity: I am Fatima Rahman, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Research Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if truth advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for loyalty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Leila Park must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Leila Park do?
